items.scenario: You recently registered for a weekend charity 5K organized by a local running club. The confirmation email did not mention where to collect your race bib. The event is this Saturday morning. You need the pickup details before then.
items.direction: Write an email to the run's organizer. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain that you registered for Saturday's charity 5K and have not received bib collection details
Explain how the missing information affects your plans to arrive and warm up before the start
Request the pickup location and hours so you can collect your bib in time
items.subject: Charity 5K bib pickup

items.scenario: You recently missed the midterm exam for your economics course because you had the flu. You have a doctor's note confirming you were sick that week. The course syllabus does not describe a makeup policy. You want to arrange an alternative.
items.direction: Write an email to your professor. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain that illness kept you from taking the economics midterm and that you have documentation
Explain how missing the exam affects your standing in the course
Request an opportunity to sit a makeup exam
items.subject: Makeup exam after illness

items.scenario: You recently booked a flight through an online travel agency for a family visit. The confirmation shows the wrong departure date, a day earlier than you chose. The trip is in two weeks. You need it corrected.
items.direction: Write an email to the travel agency. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain that your flight confirmation shows a departure date one day earlier than you selected
Explain how the incorrect date interferes with your travel plans
Request a correction to the original date without an added fee
items.subject: Wrong flight date on booking

items.scenario: You recently learned that your friend Elena is moving to another city at the end of the month. You would like to organize a farewell dinner with a few close friends before she goes. You are hoping for next Friday.
items.direction: Write an email to your friend. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain that you want to organize a farewell dinner for her before she leaves
Explain why gathering the group beforehand matters to you
Request that she let you know which evening she is free
items.subject: Farewell dinner before you move
